ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Oct-28-2025 Continued To Nov-18-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nicholas Jay appeared via zoom for Claudia Deng (petitioner).

Mr. Jay stated that he filed a status report last night, that he needs to file the death certificate for Ms. Deng's husband, and that he needs a brief continuance. The matter is continued to November 18, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Nicholas Jay appeared via zoom for Claudia Deng (petitioner).

Mr. Jay stated that his wife is pregnant and has been going back and forth to the hospital, that he is requesting a short continuance. The matter is continued to October 21, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.
